title: Darlene Forsyth
compiled_truth: Darlene Forsyth is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-06-07), Darlene Forsyth sent 19 and received 77 emails, totalling 96 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rob Walls](people/rob-walls) (4), [Kristina Mordaunt](people/kristina-mordaunt) (4), [Vicki Sharp](people/vicki-sharp) (4), [Jordan Mintz](people/jordan-mintz) (4), [Ben Glisan](people/ben-glisan) (3).
